news.title:
Tata Power resumed operations at its 4150 MW Mundra plant after a temporary suspension.
The update highlights the restart of core activities at the Mundra plant.
news.summary:
Tata Power resumed operations at its 4150 MW Mundra plant after a temporary suspension.
The update highlights the restart of core activities at the Mundra plant.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal's Sneha Poddar recommends 5 stocks, including ICICI Bank and Max Financial, with up to 48% upside potential.
Stock picks include Tata Power, Aurobindo Pharma, and IPCA Labs, backed by strong growth, profitability, and operational improvements.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal's Sneha Poddar recommends 5 stocks, including ICICI Bank and Max Financial, with up to 48% upside potential.
Stock picks include Tata Power, Aurobindo Pharma, and IPCA Labs, backed by strong growth, profitability, and operational improvements.

news.title:
Tata Power commissioned 400 kV Tanda Gonda-Basti double circuit lines spanning 154 km.
SEUPPTCL project includes 951 Ckm of 765 kV lines, enhancing UP's grid and energy security.
news.summary:
Tata Power commissioned 400 kV Tanda Gonda-Basti double circuit lines spanning 154 km.
SEUPPTCL project includes 951 Ckm of 765 kV lines, enhancing UP's grid and energy security.

news.title:
Bernstein gives bullish ratings to Tata Power, Adani Power, JSW Energy, citing India's electrification drive in thermal, nuclear, and grid-linked assets.
Adani Power, JSW Energy, and Tata Power see 15-19% upside; NTPC Green Energy rated 'Underperform' due to execution concerns.
news.summary:
Bernstein gives bullish ratings to Tata Power, Adani Power, JSW Energy, citing India's electrification drive in thermal, nuclear, and grid-linked assets.
Adani Power, JSW Energy, and Tata Power see 15-19% upside; NTPC Green Energy rated 'Underperform' due to execution concerns.

news.title:
MOSL rates Tata Power 'Buy' with a target price of Rs 455, citing SPPA for Mundra reducing losses by ~75%.
Earnings upgrade of ~5% supported by Odisha/Delhi discoms, rooftop solar growth, and 10GW backward integration.
news.summary:
MOSL rates Tata Power 'Buy' with a target price of Rs 455, citing SPPA for Mundra reducing losses by ~75%.
Earnings upgrade of ~5% supported by Odisha/Delhi discoms, rooftop solar growth, and 10GW backward integration.

news.title: Delhi may face electricity price hikes in April as govt plans to settle DISCOM debts.
news.summary: Delhi may face electricity price hikes in April as govt plans to settle DISCOM debts.

news.title:
Govt orders Tata Power's Gujarat coal plant to run at full capacity Apr-Jun.
The directive aims to strengthen power supply during the specified period.
news.summary:
Govt orders Tata Power's Gujarat coal plant to run at full capacity Apr-Jun.
The directive aims to strengthen power supply during the specified period.

news.title:
Gujarat approves Tata Power's SPPA, enabling 4,000 MW Mundra plant restart.
Tata Power confirms Gujarat cabinet approval and government order issuance.
news.summary:
Gujarat approves Tata Power's SPPA, enabling 4,000 MW Mundra plant restart.

news.title: Tata Power faced nearly ₹1,000 Cr loss in 9MFY26 from Mundra coal plant.

news.title: Gujarat Govt signs PPA with Tata Power; closure expected in weeks.
news.summary: Gujarat Govt signs PPA with Tata Power; closure expected in weeks.

news.title:
BHEL rose 5% to ₹264.75, Tata Power hit ₹418.4 (52-wk high) amid strong power sector investments.
Govt's ₹200T investment plan for power boosts renewable integration, distribution reforms, and nuclear opportunities.
news.summary:
BHEL rose 5% to ₹264.75, Tata Power hit ₹418.4 (52-wk high) amid strong power sector investments.
Govt's ₹200T investment plan for power boosts renewable integration, distribution reforms, and nuclear opportunities.

news.title:
Tata Power secures coal cost pass-through deal with Gujarat govt for Mundra.
Mundra operations to resume; Tata Power shares at ₹414, up 11% YoY.
news.summary:
Tata Power secures coal cost pass-through deal with Gujarat govt for Mundra.
Mundra operations to resume; Tata Power shares at ₹414, up 11% YoY.

news.title:
Tata Power gains 3% post Gujarat Supplementary PPA approval.
Firm eyes similar agreements with Maharashtra, Punjab, Rajasthan, Haryana.
news.summary:
Tata Power gains 3% post Gujarat Supplementary PPA approval.

news.title: Gujarat approves power purchase agreement with Tata Power for Mudra plant.
news.summary: Gujarat approves power purchase agreement with Tata Power for Mudra plant.

news.title:
Cabinet approves SHP Development Scheme FY 2026-31 with ₹2,584.6 cr outlay, targeting 1,500 MW capacity and rural development.
Stocks like SJVN, Tata Power, NHPC, BHEL, and Triveni Turbine expected to benefit from SHP projects and indigenous manufacturing focus.
news.summary:
Cabinet approves SHP Development Scheme FY 2026-31 with ₹2,584.6 cr outlay, targeting 1,500 MW capacity and rural development.
Stocks like SJVN, Tata Power, NHPC, BHEL, and Triveni Turbine expected to benefit from SHP projects and indigenous manufacturing focus.

news.title:
India mandates locally made solar ingots, wafers by 2028 to reduce Chinese imports.
Tata Power, Waaree Energies plan investments as India targets 500 GW non-fossil fuel power by 2030.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Power's peak demand in Mumbai expected to reach 1,150 MW.
The company enhances its network to ensure uninterrupted summer power supply.
news.summary:

news.title:

This decision supports Tata Power's distribution network expansion plans.

news.title:
Bajel Projects jumps 17.8% to Rs 164.9 after securing Tata Power EPC contract.
The order involves monopoles, foundation works for 220 kV transmission line in Mumbai.
